feeds.label: 🌍 USGS Global Earthquakes (30 days, hourly)
feeds.description: Every recorded earthquake worldwide, bucketed into hourly counts. ~720 points. Stable, CORS-open, no key.

feeds.label: ₿ Bitcoin daily closes (1 year, CoinGecko)
feeds.description: BTC-USD daily close prices for the last 365 days. ~366 points. CORS-open, no key.

feeds.label: 💵 USD/EUR exchange rate (20 years daily, FRED)
feeds.description: Federal Reserve daily USD/EUR exchange rate. ~7,000+ points going back to 1999. CSV format. CORS-open, no key.

feeds.label: 📈 10-Year Treasury yield (daily, FRED)
feeds.description: Daily 10-year US Treasury constant maturity rate. ~14,000 points back to 1962. CSV. CORS-open, no key.

feeds.label: 📉 3-Month T-Bill yield (daily, FRED)
feeds.description: Daily 3-month Treasury bill secondary market rate. ~15,000 points back to 1954. CSV. CORS-open, no key.

feeds.label: 🌀 VIX volatility index (daily, FRED)
feeds.description: CBOE VIX daily close. ~9,000 points back to 1990. CSV. CORS-open, no key.

feeds.label: 🌐 Wilshire 5000 total market index (daily, FRED)
feeds.description: Wilshire 5000 full cap total return index, daily. ~8,000 points back to 1990. CSV. CORS-open, no key.

feeds.label: ☀️ NOAA solar wind speed (real-time, 1-min)
feeds.description: Real-time solar wind proton speed from NOAA SWPC. ~3,000 points (last 2 days at 1-min cadence). JSON. CORS-open, no key.

feeds.label: 🧲 NOAA planetary K-index (3-hourly)
feeds.description: Planetary K index every 3 hours. ~1,000 points (last 4 months). JSON. CORS-open, no key.

feeds.label: 🪙 Ethereum daily closes (1 year, CoinGecko)
feeds.description: ETH-USD daily close prices, last 365 days. ~366 points. CORS-open, no key.

feeds.label: 🏭 US Industrial Production Index (monthly, FRED)
feeds.description: Industrial Production Index, monthly. ~1,300 points back to 1919. CSV. CORS-open, no key.

feeds.label: 💼 US Unemployment rate (monthly, FRED)
feeds.description: US unemployment rate, monthly. ~950 points back to 1948. CSV. CORS-open, no key.

notes: All feeds are CORS-open and require no API key. To add more, edit this file and submit a PR. Avoid: Yahoo Finance (blocks server-side), Stooq (JS challenge), Alpha Vantage demo key (returns Information message, not data).
